# This file matches the official CaseMaster table schema from Police-FIR-ER-Diagram.pdf
# CrimeNo format: [1-digit category][4-digit district][4-digit station][4-digit year][5-digit serial]

column18: Theft reported at residential apartment in Koramangala 5th Block. Gold jewelry worth Rs. 2 lakhs stolen. Suspect gained entry using duplicate key. Investigation ongoing.
Vehicle theft case. Honda Activa (KA-01-AB-1234) stolen from Sony World Signal parking. CCTV footage shows suspect cutting lock at 2:30 AM. Registration details verified.
Online banking fraud. Victim received phishing call claiming to be from bank. Rs. 45000 transferred to unknown account. Cyber crime unit investigating.
Chain snatching on Whitefield Main Road. Two suspects on motorbike snatched gold chain from pedestrian. Victim sustained minor injuries. Suspects absconding.
Assault case following road rage incident at ITPL junction. Two persons involved in altercation. Both sustained minor injuries. Chargesheet filed.
Pickpocketing at Forum Mall. Mobile phone (iPhone 13) stolen from victim's pocket in crowded area. Suspect identified from CCTV footage. Investigation in progress.
Burglary at electronics shop in Koramangala 8th Block. Stock worth Rs. 3 lakhs stolen. Similar MO to CrimeNo 104430006202600001. Same suspect suspected.
Hit and run accident on Varthur Road. Pedestrian critically injured. Vehicle number partially captured on CCTV. Traffic police assisting investigation.
Cyber crime - social media fraud. Fake investment scheme promoted on Facebook. Multiple victims reported. Total fraud amount Rs. 12 lakhs. IT Act sections invoked.
Auto-rickshaw theft from Marathahalli stand. Owner received ransom call demanding Rs. 10000. Call traced. Investigation ongoing.
